goals.title: Build the Health Dog homepage exactly from /Users/cosmos/Downloads/he...
goals.objective: Build the Health Dog homepage exactly from /Users/cosmos/Downloads/healthdog_homepage_planning (2).md into the current pet-clone-site, preserving working static delivery, browser QA, evidence, and cleanup receipts.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser happy path: run the static site, open /index.html at desktop 1440x1200 and mobile 390x1100, capture screenshots; PASS iff the page visibly implements the planning doc sequence: 3 hero messages/slides, Health Dog intro, six branch cards with channel actions, named pet cards with branch/status tags, review/source cards, trust/care cards, content hub, and final 상담 CTA without broken major layout.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/20260616-planning-build/desktop-fullpage.png + .omo/evidence/20260616-planning-build/mobile-fullpage.png + browser metrics JSON with cleanup receipt
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Desktop/mobile happy path PASS. Evidence: .omo/evidence/20260616-planning-build/desktop-fullpage.png, mobile-fullpage.png, browser-metrics.json, cleanup-receipt.md. Planning sequence visible; no horizontal overflow; zero broken images.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser interaction edge path: in the running page, use branch/type/status filters and consultation branch selector; PASS iff filtering exposes expected cards and empty state only when appropriate, mobile nav opens/closes, and branch-specific 상담/네이버/인스타/블로그 actions remain reachable.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Interaction edge path PASS. Evidence: .omo/evidence/20260616-planning-build/interaction-metrics.json and filter-state.png. Hero dots, Suwon branch filter, cat filter, Songpa branch selector actions, and mobile nav open/close passed.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression and guardrail commands: run node --test pet-clone-site/tests/site-structure.test.mjs, node --check app.js/content.js, scan runtime sources for stale brand/secret/forbidden hard-sell or medical-guarantee copy; PASS iff tests/checks pass, all local assets exist, six Naver links exist, and no prohibited phrases like 최저가 보장/100% 보장/무조건 건강/당일 데려가세요 leak into runtime.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression/guardrail PASS. Evidence: final-node-test.txt, final-app-check.txt, final-content-check.txt, forbidden-scan.txt, visual-qa-report.md, final-commands.txt. LSP diagnostics unavailable because workspace lacks TypeScript installation.

goals.evidence: Health Dog planning-doc homepage implemented in pet-clone-site. Tests/checks/browser QA/visual QA evidence pass; dev server is available at http://127.0.0.1:8790/index.html. Review-work subagents unavailable due OAuth 401, recorded in quality gate.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/healthdog-planning-20260616/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/healthdog-planning-20260616/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: Health Dog planning-doc homepage implemented in pet-clone-site. Tests/checks/browser QA/visual QA evidence pass; dev server is available at http://127.0.0.1:8790/index.html. Review-work subagents unavailable due OAuth 401, recorded in quality gate.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/healthdog-planning-20260616/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/healthdog-planning-20260616/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
